name: LINTAS
tagline: GIS-Based Transportation Infrastructure Governance Application for Smart Governance.

data.title: Transforming Asset Data into Dynamic Spatial Information
data.description: LINTAS (Service Inventory & Asset System Management) digitalizes all transportation infrastructure asset data into an interactive map for accurate oversight, rapid response, and Data-Driven Decision Making.

features.title: Spatial Visualization (GIS)
features.desc: Interactive geographic mapping that enables the determination of new Street Lighting (PJU) or CCTV installation locations based on actual blind spots, rather than mere estimates.

features.title: WhatsApp Dispatching
features.desc: Cutting through bureaucracy to increase Speed of Response. Damage reports are forwarded directly to Field Teams via WhatsApp within hours.

features.title: Detailed Asset Inventory
features.desc: A comprehensive database covering technical asset specifications (length, width, pavement type) as well as precise location coordinates and physical condition documentation.

features.title: Transparent Activity Log
features.desc: The system records all user activity history in detail (Who, When, What was done) to prevent data manipulation and ensure measurable accountability.

items.q: What is the main difference between LINTAS and manual data collection?
items.a: Manual data collection relies on fragmented physical documents prone to loss and difficult to access. LINTAS transforms them into a centralized relational database with instant web access, interactive geographic map visualization, and automatic data backups.

items.q: How does this application manage access rights (Role-Based Access)?
items.a: The system organizes tasks structurally: Admin/Operators manage the inventory, Field Teams execute repairs via digital map references, and the Head of Department acts as the decision-maker based on measurable reports.

items.q: Is LINTAS able to prevent data duplication or asset loss?
items.a: Yes. LINTAS implements data centralization to eliminate departmental silos, minimize data collection duplication between sections, and features a transparent activity log (digital trail) as an absolute security layer.
